state.topic: The crazy reaction: elephant toothpaste in 10 seconds
state.script:
The crazy reaction: elephant toothpaste in 10 seconds.
What if you could watch it explode in a blink?
Grab hydrogen peroxide, add dish soap, sprinkle yeast.
Stir quick, step back—foam shoots up like a geyser.
It fills the bowl in seconds, huge and fizzy.
But the real kick? It’s safe to touch after it cools.
Tag a friend who loves crazy science!
state.caption: Elephant toothpaste in 10 seconds – insane!
